title: Workflow Definition
description: A declarative workflow file (ADR-0018). Stored under workflows/<name>.yaml. Sequences Skill invocations with dependencies, checkpoints, and event triggers. The runtime topologically sorts steps and runs ready steps concurrently when possible.

id.description: Workflow id. Built-in: dotted (resume.full, resume.tailoring). Community: com_<author>_<name> (ADR-0004 §3).

version.description: Semver. Breaking changes (renamed steps, removed checkpoints) bump major.

trigger.description: manual = resume workflow run <id>. event = auto-start when trigger_event fires (watch mode). cron = scheduled (future).

trigger_event.description: Required if trigger: event. An event type from docs/runtime/event-catalog.md. Null otherwise.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps. The runtime resolves dependencies (depends_on) to form a DAG; independent steps run concurrently.

id.description: Step id, unique within the workflow. Used in interpolation: ${steps.<id>.artifact_path}.

skill.description: Skill id from skills/registry.yaml (ADR-0004 §4). The runtime resolves id → path.

phase.description: For checkpoint-pipeline Skills (ADR-0006), which SKILL.md phase to run. Null for single-phase Skills.

depends_on.description: Step ids that must complete before this step. Forms a DAG. Cycles rejected at load time.

inputs.description: Input map for the Skill invocation. Values may interpolate: ${trigger.<field>}, ${steps.<id>.artifact_path}, ${steps.<id>.output.<field>}.

checkpoint.description: If true, pause after the step emits its artifact; surface to user; wait for approval before running dependents (ADR-0006).

on_success_event.description: Domain event to emit on step success (ADR-0014). Null = no event emitted.
